shadows.name: card-rest
shadows.purpose: Resting card elevation. Barely visible — just enough to lift off the page.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Interactive card on hover. Combined with translateY(-1px).

shadows.name: dialog
shadows.purpose: Dialogs, dropdowns, popovers. Detaches surface without theatrics.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Keyboard focus ring. Violet Ink, 2px, 2px offset.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Default easing for all enter/hover transitions. Fast start, smooth deceleration.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: State changes within a surface (color, opacity). Not for positional moves.

motion.name: duration-quick
motion.purpose: Button hover color shift, badge state changes.

motion.name: duration-smooth
motion.purpose: Card hover lift, nav item transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default action button. Violet Ink background, white text, 8px radius. The most visible interactive element on any page.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; background: #641bc4; color: #ffffff; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), transform 80ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #7b22e8; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); background: #641bc4; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #ffffff, 0 0 0 4px #641bc4; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; transform: none; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent with Border Fine stroke. Used alongside Primary for cancel/secondary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; background: transparent; color: #0f172a; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), border-color 120ms, transform 80ms; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #f1f5f9; border-color: #cbd5e1; } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #641bc4; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Semantic status indicators. Four variants: published/active (emerald), pending/draft (amber or muted), error/failed (crimson). Always paired with an icon.
components.html: PublishedPendingFailed
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.6; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-badge-published { background: #dff9d8; color: #065f46; } .ds-badge-pending { background: #ffe9cc; color: #92400e; } .ds-badge-error { background: #fddada; color: #991b1b; } .ds-badge-draft { background: #f1f5f9; color: #64748b; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form input. Label always above, never placeholder-only. Violet Ink focus ring.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-field-label { font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: #0f172a; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-input { font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: #0f172a; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 8px; padding: 9px 12px; width: 100%; transition: border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), box-shadow 120ms; outline: none; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #64748b; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #641bc4; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(100,27,196,0.15); } .ds-input:disabled { background: #f1f5f9; color: #64748b; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Data Table Row
components.description: The primary data surface. Chalk White rows with fine bottom border. Numeric columns use Geist Mono. Row hover to Violet Tint at low opacity.
components.html:
StudentScoreGradeStatus
Adaeze Okonkwo87APassed
Chukwuemeka Eze54CPending
components.css: .ds-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-th { background: #f1f5f9; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #0f172a; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; padding: 10px 16px; text-align: left; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0; } .ds-th-num { text-align: right; } .ds-tr { transition: background 100ms; } .ds-tr:hover { background: rgba(240,229,255,0.5); } .ds-td { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: #0f172a; padding: 14px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0; } .ds-td-num { text-align: right; font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Navigation item in the admin sidebar. Active state uses Violet Tint background with Violet Ink left inset bar.
components.html: DashboardClassesUsers
components.css: .ds-sidebar { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; padding: 8px; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 6px; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #64748b; text-decoration: none; transition: background 120ms, color 120ms; position: relative; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #f1f5f9; color: #0f172a; } .ds-nav-item-active { background: #f0e5ff; color: #641bc4; font-weight: 600; } .ds-nav-item-active::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 6px; bottom: 6px; width: 3px; background: #641bc4; border-radius: 0 3px 3px 0; }

narrative.overview:
A school register in Nigeria is a sacred object: attendance, scores, and official standing recorded with ink and precision. Every teacher knows it. Every student fears and respects it. ParaLearn is that register made digital. The design language inherits the register's qualities: structured, legible at a glance, authoritative without being cold.

The reference point is Linear applied to daylight. Linear's precision, weight contrast, and respect for the user's time, but running in a bright room where admins process 300 report cards before lunch. The product must function as a trusted instrument, not a showcase.

This system rejects the generic SaaS purple-gradient reflex: no glowing button shadows, no blurred glassmorphism panels, no gradient text headings. It equally rejects the bloated admin template: no 40-link sidebars, no card overuse, no inconsistent grey toolbars.
keyCharacteristics: Light background (bright daylight context); dark accents carry authority
Manrope throughout: tight tracking at large sizes, readable at small sizes
Violet Ink used at ≤10% of any screen surface; rarity is its power
Semantic color only for status; never decoration
Flat-by-default surfaces; subtle shadow only for interactive lift states
8px radius for interactive elements; 12px for containers
8px base spacing unit with deliberate variation, not uniform repetition

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Violet Ink appears on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point.

rules.name: The Signal Purity Rule
rules.body: Semantic colors (Emerald, Amber, Crimson, Cobalt) are never used for decoration.

rules.name: The No Gradient Rule
rules.body: No linear-gradient or radial-gradient involving brand colors on interactive elements, text, or content surfaces.

rules.name: The Single Family Rule
rules.body: Manrope is used everywhere in the product. Inter is prohibited.

rules.name: The Weight Contrast Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy is expressed through weight jumps of at least 200. Two consecutive levels must not share the same weight.

rules.name: The Tabular Numbers Rule
rules.body: Any column of numbers uses font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums. Proportional numerals in data tables are prohibited.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, dialog, dropdown). A shadow on a resting data table row is decoration.

rules.name: The Tinted Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadow color is tinted toward Midnight Slate, never pure black. rgba(15,23,42,...) not rgba(0,0,0,...).

rules.name: The No Glassmorphism Rule
rules.body: backdrop-filter: blur and bg-white/70 are prohibited on resting content surfaces.

dos: Use Manrope exclusively inside the product shell
Keep Violet Ink to ≤10% of any screen surface
Use font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums on every numeric data column
Pair every status color with an icon
Use 8px radius for interactive elements, 12px for containers
Use translateY(-1px) + shadow on interactive card hover at 150ms
Place input labels above inputs, always visible
Design empty states for every list and table
Use Border Fine (#e2e8f0) as the universal divider
donts: Don't use Inter inside the product shell
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text + gradient) anywhere in the product
Don't use glassmorphism on resting content surfaces
Don't use rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl on buttons
Don't add box-shadow glow to primary buttons
Don't use pure #000000 or #ffffff for text or backgrounds
Don't animate layout properties — only transform and opacity
Don't use border-left accent stripes on cards
